mapper.insert: INSERT INTO interview_session (interview_id, user_id, role, difficulty, status, start_time) VALUES (#{interviewId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{difficulty}, '进行中', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE interview_session SET status = '已结束', end_time = NOW() WHERE interview_id = #{interviewId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (interview_id, user_id, question_id, user_answer, ai_feedback, score, create_time) VALUES (#{interviewId}, #{userId}, #{questionId}, #{userAnswer}, #{aiFeedback}, #{score}, NOW())

INSERT INTO interview_report (interview_id, user_id, total_score, conclusion, dimensions, strengths, weaknesses, suggestion, create_time) VALUES (#{interviewId}, #{userId}, #{totalScore}, #{conclusion}, #{dimensions}, #{strengths}, #{weaknesses}, #{suggestion}, NOW())
